projects.title: PCA Analysis of Quasar UV Spectra
projects.subtitle: Astronomical Data Science & Spectroscopy
projects.description: Reconstructed full quasar continuum spectra by applying PCA to red-side spectral weights and reproducing the mean transmitted flux-redshift relation.
projects.extendedDescription: Implemented spectroscopic analysis in Python, applied dimensionality reduction to high-resolution UV data, and reconstructed complete continuum spectra from partial spectral information.
projects.impact: Recovered full quasar continuum spectra from partial spectral data by applying PCA-based dimensionality reduction.

projects.title: Deming Regression Analysis of Tully-Fisher Relation
projects.subtitle: Bayesian Analysis of Galaxy Velocity-Luminosity Data
projects.description: Improved Tully-Fisher distance analysis by applying Bayesian regression that accounts for uncertainty in both velocity and luminosity.
projects.extendedDescription: Extended the model across early and late-type spiral galaxies to evaluate whether population-specific fits improve distance estimation.
projects.impact: Accounted for bidirectional uncertainty and compared multiple galaxy populations to improve the reliability of distance indicators.

projects.title: NFL Data Analysis & Prediction
projects.subtitle: Machine Learning for Sports Analytics
projects.description: Achieved 75%+ precision on pivotal NFL play prediction by training neural network and random forest models on 50,000+ plays.
projects.extendedDescription: Built feature pipelines to predict fumble probability, classify offensive formations, and identify the features most correlated with pivotal plays.
projects.impact: Processed 50,000+ plays and reached 75%+ precision by pairing feature engineering with neural network and random forest models.

projects.title: Analysis of One-Dimensional Thermal Conductivity
projects.subtitle: Computational Physics & Numerical Methods
projects.description: Validated modified heat equation predictions by analyzing 1D thermal conductivity behavior across space and time in a copper rod.
projects.extendedDescription: Combined Python analysis with faster C++ numerical computations to compare measured thermal behavior against model predictions.
projects.impact: Confirmed model behavior by reproducing copper rod thermal conductivity patterns with numerical methods.
